body:
Marcus, thanks for the follow-up on the [Halfway Capital](org/halfway-capital) side of the [CarbonVector](deal/carbonvector) conversation — your perspective on the Series A pricing was exactly what I needed to pressure-test our own numbers. I've gone back through the model and I think there's a real case for anchoring the pre-money closer to $28M given the traction they've shown in Q3, but I'm curious whether [a16z](org/a16z) would still have appetite at that level or if the team's burn trajectory is a concern for your partnership. I'd love to get on a call this week to align before either of us goes back to the founders with a signal. Thursday afternoon works well on my end — does 3pm ET suit you?

Amara
